stemHtml: What do you understand by “unreliable airspeed”?

options.a: Airspeed indications affected by pitot/static system errors, but without triggering a warning and being automatically removed from displays and computations.
options.b: Airspeed indications affected by pitot/static system errors, triggering a warning and being automatically removed from displays and computations.
options.c: A procedure dealing with the recovery of the ASI only.
options.d: A modern commercial aviation EFIS feature.
